Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw

img = Image.open\("/Users/johan.forsell/Developer/vitrine-static-web/icon.png"\).convert\("RGBA"\)
img = img.resize\(\(256, 256\), Image.LANCZOS\)

# Create rounded mask
mask = Image.new\("L", \(256, 256\), 0\)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(mask\)
radius = 58  # ~22% corner radius, matches iOS style
draw.rounded_rectangle\([0, 0, 256, 256], radius=radius, fill=255\)

# Apply mask
img.putalpha\(mask\)

# Save at 32x32 for favicon
favicon = img.resize\(\(32, 32\), Image.LANCZOS\)
favicon.save\("/Users/johan.forsell/Developer/vitrine-static-web/favicon.png", "PNG"\)
print\("done"\)
PYEOF)
